title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXXVIII. Lullabies.
content:
Hey, my kitten, my kitten,
            And hey, my kitten, my deary!
        Such a sweet pet as this
            Was neither far nor neary.

        Here we go up, up, up,
            And here we go down, down, downy;
        And here we go backwards and forwards,
            And here we go round, round, roundy.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXXVIII. Lullabies."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
